description_for_human: Shop premium wigs, bundles, frontals and hair accessories from Boss Queens Collection. Free worldwide shipping on orders over $100.
description_for_model: Search and browse premium human hair products including wigs (bob, lace front, headband, colored), hair bundles (Brazilian, Peruvian, Indian, Malaysian, Vietnamese), lace frontals, and hair accessories. Supports natural language semantic search. All products are 100% virgin human hair shipped worldwide from St. Maarten, Caribbean. Free shipping on orders over $100 USD.
